jsonLd.title: Lifestyle is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Lifestyle! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Meerut team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Lifestyle:
Lifestyle is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lifestyle!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
